hard_fail_conditions: a biological final object or named biological law is used as a premise in the root-native stage
a Standard Model node-level PASS is described as an end-to-end Standard Model derivation
an exact-within-declared-architecture Standard Model result is promoted to unrestricted-root status
the Information Chemistry composition quotient is described as real atomic or molecular chemistry without calibration
a biological semantic module lacks parents, required observables, a gate, a passing control, a failing control, or a status
a calibrated_readout claim lacks a frozen encoder, calibration split, held-out split, intervention or transport control, uncertainty, and independent checker
the same measured outcomes are used both to construct and independently check an encoder
the biological label is used to choose the root quotient before the quotient and grammar are frozen
an Open or Dr bridge is reported as Th_coqc, finite_diagnostic, or empirically established
a missing observable is replaced with zero, normal, absent, or inferred without an explicit model and uncertainty
a mutation-only, pathway-only, or growth-only label is treated as proof of cross-scale corrigibility rupture
channel failure is conflated with unreported decoder drift
local viability is inferred without a declared environment and boundary contract
global tissue viability is inferred from isolated-unit measurements alone
operator capture is claimed without lineage-dependent context rewrite, local viability expansion, and global viability contraction
the persistent pathology gate is claimed without a frozen horizon and transient-conflict control
the extension changes Biology Root-Native v0.1 closure counts or modifies biology_closure_v0_1.py
a clinical diagnosis, treatment, dose, molecule design, synthesis route, or manufacturing instruction is emitted
the dependency graph contains a cycle
a parent node is missing
the verifier or source specifications are missing
a claim stronger than PARTIAL_UNCALIBRATED_SEMANTIC_COMPILER is emitted
